fxNote: All reviews verified on the public Google Maps profile and displayed with the patient's permission inferred from public posting. Patient names are reduced to first name + last initial or anonymized handles.

reviews.body: I had Ulthera here. The pricing was excellent, and this is definitely not an assembly-line clinic. It was my first procedure so it stung a bit — but the conversation with the doctor put me completely at ease. The nursing staff were incredibly kind. I'll be back.

Three rounds of Ulthera 600 shots and Juvelook Volume 3cc each. I'm genuinely thrilled — my face contour looks slimmer and my nasolabial lines have softened noticeably. I'll be back when the effect fades. Everyone is friendly and the doctors are skilled.

These days, so many skin clinics open and close so quickly. But Tune Clinic is different — it isn't a place that pops up and disappears. It has stayed in the same place, consistently welcoming patients with care and sincerity. That's why I always trust them whenever I visit. Thank you for always providing steady, thoughtful treatments and for understanding my constantly changing concerns. I'm extremely satisfied with this treatment as well.

My very first facial in Korea was at Tune Clinic. There were six of us going to the clinic. Four of us had the Cetera facial with non-invasive procedures. The staff were very helpful with translation and making sure we were comfortable. Overall a very good experience. We'll try other services next time.

The overall experience is excellent. The staff is friendly and super helpful when it comes to communication, since I don't speak Korean. Treatments are professional. I would totally recommend this place.
After Ulthera, my facial contour kept getting more defined as time passed. The result settled in so naturally that I'm even more satisfied than I expected.
I was really worried about Rejuran because I'd heard it hurts, but it was much more comfortable than I expected. After about four days, my skin started to feel like it was filling back in.
First time in Korea, and did my first Cetera facial here. I feel very rejuvenated. The staff were great — they spoke English and I understood everything.

I've been a regular since the early days when the clinic was further up in Apgujeong. I'd like to take pride in helping it grow, although I don't actually visit that often — home is far away, so I really only come when I urgently need it. Even so, I've been visiting consistently three to four times a year. Tune Clinic is genuinely a cut above. And the pricing is honest, too.
Above all, the pricing is genuinely outstanding value, so I keep recommending it to everyone around me.
There's no assembly-line feeling at all — the doctors look at each patient individually and plan accordingly. I'm satisfied.
The clinic felt warm and professional. I didn't feel rushed and I highly recommend it.
